title: Senior Teacher - VIT University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - VIT University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
